title: scutellaria albida subsp. albida
intro: Scutellaria albida subsp. albida, also known as white skullcap, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is native to Europe and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The plant is known to exhibit health benefits such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Scutellaria albida subsp. albida can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote relaxation and alleviate digestive issues.
